description: SECURITY ALERT: Our spam filter has failed and unsolicited emails have bypassed it and landed in your inbox mixed with legitimate email. Identify all spam/suspicious emails and move them to the Junk folder. Create a new IMAP folder named 'Spam-Incidents' and move at least 3 of the most egregious spam examples into it for the security team's review. Draft an email to security-response@company.com with the subject 'Spam Filter Bypass Incident Report' where the body lists the subject lines of the identified spam, the total count found, and a description of the types of spam present. Login: username ga, password password123.
